messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.
Como criar log groups no OCI Logging?

Para configurar observabilidade no OCI:

**1. Logging:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "staging-logs"

# Criar Service Log (VCN Flow Logs)
oci logging log create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --log-group-id <log-group-ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-flow-logs" \
  --log-type SERVICE \
  --is-enabled true \
  --configuration '{"source": {"category": "flowlogs", "resource": "<vcn-ocid>", "sourceType": "OCISERVICE"}}' \
  --retention-duration 30
```

**2. Monitoring e Alarms:**
```bash
# Criar alarm de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-staging" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --metric-compartment-id <ocid> \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic AVG \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 80 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

**3. Notifications:**
```bash
# Criar tópico
oci ons topic create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "staging-alerts"

# Adicionar subscription (email)
oci ons subscription create \
  --topic-id <topic-ocid> \
  --protocol EMAIL \
  --endpoint "admin@example.com"
```

**Métricas disponíveis:**
- Compute: CPU, Memory, Disk, Network
- Block Volume: IOPS, Throughput, Latency
- Load Balancer: Request Count, Latency, Errors
- Database: CPU, Storage, Connections

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.
Como configurar alerts baseados em logs?

Para configurar observabilidade no OCI:

**1. Logging:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "sandbox-logs"

# Criar Service Log (VCN Flow Logs)
oci logging log create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --log-group-id <log-group-ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-flow-logs" \
  --log-type SERVICE \
  --is-enabled true \
  --configuration '{"source": {"category": "flowlogs", "resource": "<vcn-ocid>", "sourceType": "OCISERVICE"}}' \
  --retention-duration 30
```

**2. Monitoring e Alarms:**
```bash
# Criar alarm de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --metric-compartment-id <ocid> \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic AVG \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 80 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

**3. Notifications:**
```bash
# Criar tópico
oci ons topic create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "sandbox-alerts"

# Adicionar subscription (email)
oci ons subscription create \
  --topic-id <topic-ocid> \
  --protocol EMAIL \
  --endpoint "admin@example.com"
```

**Métricas disponíveis:**
- Compute: CPU, Memory, Disk, Network
- Block Volume: IOPS, Throughput, Latency
- Load Balancer: Request Count, Latency, Errors
- Database: CPU, Storage, Connections

Como criar log groups no OCI Logging?

Para configurar observabilidade no OCI:

**1. Logging:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "development-logs"

# Criar Service Log (VCN Flow Logs)
oci logging log create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --log-group-id <log-group-ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-flow-logs" \
  --log-type SERVICE \
  --is-enabled true \
  --configuration '{"source": {"category": "flowlogs", "resource": "<vcn-ocid>", "sourceType": "OCISERVICE"}}' \
  --retention-duration 30
```

**2. Monitoring e Alarms:**
```bash
# Criar alarm de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-development" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --metric-compartment-id <ocid> \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic AVG \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 80 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

**3. Notifications:**
```bash
# Criar tópico
oci ons topic create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "development-alerts"

# Adicionar subscription (email)
oci ons subscription create \
  --topic-id <topic-ocid> \
  --protocol EMAIL \
  --endpoint "admin@example.com"
```
